description:
Long-term, shared agent memory exposed as tools, backed by xTrace Memory Manager.
Exposes two agent tools: 'remember' stores conversation turns and 'recall' returns the relevant, ready-to-inject context. Set your API key and org id and it works; point several agents at the same org (and group) to share one memory.

agent_id.description: Optional agent scope stamped on ingested memories and AND-narrowed on recall.
agent_id.title: Agent id

app_id.description: Optional app scope stamped on ingested memories and AND-narrowed on recall.
app_id.title: App id

base_url.description: xTrace Memory API base URL. Production by default; use https://api.staging.xtrace.ai for staging.
base_url.title: Base URL

extract_artifacts.description: Opt into artifact extraction (the most expensive stage). Facts and episodes are always extracted. Leave off unless you need it.
extract_artifacts.title: Extract artifacts

ingest_timeout.description: Max seconds to wait/poll for an ingest job to reach a terminal state.
ingest_timeout.title: Ingest timeout (s)

search_limit.description: Maximum number of memory rows to retrieve per recall.
search_limit.title: Recall limit

search_mode.description: 'compose' returns a ready-to-inject markdown context block (LLM-selected); 'retrieve' returns ranked rows only.
search_mode.title: Recall mode

wait.description: When on, ingest waits (up to ~30s) for extraction to finish so the agent gets a terminal result. When off, ingest returns immediately and runs in the background.
wait.title: Synchronous ingest

api_key.description: xTrace API key (xtk_...). Get it from the Developer Portal: app.xtrace.ai → Settings → API Keys (not in mem.xtrace.ai).
api_key.title: API Key

group_ids.description: Optional. Comma-separated group ids (grp_...) to share memory across users/agents. Leave empty for private memory.
group_ids.title: Group ids (shared memory)

org_id.description: xTrace organization id (org_...). Same place as the API key: app.xtrace.ai → Settings → API Keys.
org_id.title: Org id

show_advanced.description: Show advanced options. The defaults work for most cases — leave off for a simple setup.
show_advanced.title: Advanced settings

user_id.description: Who this memory belongs to (used to store and recall). Can be passed by the agent per call.
user_id.title: User id

title: xTrace Memory
